failure_reason: Follow-up feedback clarified that TypeScript data constants were still code hardcoding and not i18n. The presence catalog, people directory data, page copy, visual configuration, brand/source visuals, motif layers, and fallback text were moved to external locale JSON; route code now resolves the request locale, deep-merges locale overrides over English, and renders dynamic localized presence pages.
